nodes.label: WidgetRenderer
nodes.summary: Registry-based React component that dynamically dispatches rendering to the correct widget component based on widget.type.

nodes.label: WIDGET_REGISTRY
nodes.summary: Strongly-typed Record mapping Widget type discriminants to React component constructors, enabling exhaustive compile-time matching.

nodes.label: TextWidget
nodes.summary: Stub widget component for text type; returns null as text content is rendered by MessageBubble.

nodes.label: lib/ai.ts
nodes.summary: Configures and exports the AI model using @ai-sdk/openai pointed at SiliconFlow's OpenAI-compatible API with DeepSeek-V4-Flash.

nodes.label: getModel
nodes.summary: Returns a configured chat model instance using siliconflow provider with DeepSeek-V4-Flash, forcing Chat Completions API.

nodes.label: SiliconFlow Provider
nodes.summary: OpenAI-compatible API provider hosted at api.siliconflow.com, used as the inference backend for the application.

nodes.label: lib/dns-patch.mjs
nodes.summary: Monkey-patches Node.js dns.lookup to fall back to Google Public DNS (8.8.8.8 / 1.1.1.1) when system resolver fails, fixing Tailscale + NixOS DNS issues.

nodes.label: lib/skills.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the Skill interface and BUILTIN_SKILLS array listing trigger keywords and prompt templates for widget-generating skills.

nodes.label: Skill
nodes.summary: TypeScript interface defining a skill with name, trigger keyword, description, and prompt template fields.

nodes.label: BUILTIN_SKILLS
nodes.summary: Array of built-in skill definitions covering kanban, dashboard, gravity simulation, and interactive table triggers.

nodes.label: lib/db/index.ts
nodes.summary: Creates and exports a Drizzle ORM database instance connected to PostgreSQL via connection pool using DATABASE_URL env variable.

nodes.label: db
nodes.summary: Exported Drizzle ORM instance bound to the PostgreSQL pool and schema, used for all database queries.

nodes.label: lib/db/schema.ts
nodes.summary: Defines PostgreSQL table schemas for chats and messages using Drizzle ORM pg-core, including JSONB columns for widget and tool invocations.

nodes.label: chats table
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table representing a chat session with id, title, and createdAt timestamp.

nodes.label: messages table
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table storing chat messages with role, content, jsonb widget column, jsonb toolInvocations column, and cascade-delete FK to chats.

nodes.label: types/widget.ts
nodes.summary: Central Zod schema definitions for all widget types and the AIResponse schema; exports TypeScript types inferred from schemas.

nodes.label: GravityParamsSchema
nodes.summary: Zod schema defining gravity simulation parameters: celestial bodies with mass, radius, color, position, and velocity vectors.

nodes.label: KanbanParamsSchema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for kanban board columns containing tasks with id, title, and priority enum.

nodes.label: DashboardParamsSchema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for dashboard widget with KPIs, chart configuration, and optional table data.

nodes.label: HtmlCanvasParamsSchema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for html-canvas widget carrying raw HTML/CSS/JS payload to render inside an iframe.

nodes.label: WidgetSchema
nodes.summary: Zod discriminated union of all widget type schemas keyed on the 'type' literal field.

nodes.label: AIResponseSchema
nodes.summary: Top-level Zod schema combining a widget payload with a text string, representing the full AI response structure.

nodes.label: ChatMessage
nodes.summary: TypeScript type extending chat messages with optional widget, createdAt, and toolInvocations fields for agent loop support.

nodes.label: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Defines a PostgreSQL 15-alpine service named intellirender_db on port 5432 with a persistent pgdata volume.

nodes.label: extra_features_architecture.md
nodes.summary: Architecture document describing the persistence layer (PostgreSQL + Drizzle), sidebar, glassmorphism UI, and message deletion features added beyond the core proof-of-concept.

nodes.label: migration_anthropic_to_ollama.md
nodes.summary: Documents the migration from Anthropic SDK to Ollama local inference via OpenAI-compatible API, including model selection rationale (Qwen2.5-Coder over MiniCPM-V).

nodes.label: phase_2_documentation.md
nodes.summary: Documents Phase 2: Widget Protocol Design using Zod schemas, replacement of streamText with generateObject, and creation of widget-parser utility.

nodes.label: phase_3_documentation.md
nodes.summary: Documents Phase 3: Widget Renderer Architecture implementing the registry pattern and migrating ChatWindow from useChat hook to custom fetch.

nodes.label: phase_4_documentation.md
nodes.summary: Documents Phase 4: Full interactive Kanban widget with HTML5 drag-and-drop and Framer Motion animations.

nodes.label: phase_6_documentation.md
nodes.summary: Documents Phase 6: 3D Gravity Visualizer using Three.js, React Three Fiber, and a real-time N-body physics simulation at 60 FPS.

nodes.label: exp/colorpallet.html
nodes.summary: Experimental static HTML canvas demoing three chatbot UI color palettes (Calm & Focused, Midnight Focus, Warm & Playful) with simulated chat bubbles and hex codes.

nodes.label: exp/game.html
nodes.summary: Experimental canvas implementing Conway's Game of Life on a 60x40 DOM grid with play/pause, step, and randomize controls.

nodes.label: exp/sorting.html
nodes.summary: Experimental canvas implementing an animated Bubble Sort visualizer with 40 bars, adjustable speed slider, and play/pause/reset controls.

nodes.label: N-Body Physics Engine
nodes.summary: Client-side real-time N-body gravitational simulation using Newton's law, running at 60 FPS via useFrame with orbital trail tracking.

nodes.label: Glassmorphism UI
nodes.summary: UI design approach using backdrop-blur, translucent borders, and radial gradients for a layered frosted-glass aesthetic.

nodes.label: Drizzle ORM
nodes.summary: TypeScript-native ORM chosen over Prisma for NixOS compatibility; used for all database interactions in this project.

nodes.label: Structured AI Output (generateObject)
nodes.summary: AI SDK pattern using generateObject() with Zod schema enforcement to produce validated JSON widget payloads instead of raw text streams.

edges.note: WidgetRenderer defines and uses WIDGET_REGISTRY for component dispatch
Imports Widget type from @/types/widget
TextWidget is registered under the 'text' key
WidgetRenderer renders TextWidget for text-type widgets
lib/ai.ts exports getModel function
Configures createOpenAI client pointing to SiliconFlow's API endpoint
getModel returns siliconflow.chat('deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V4-Flash')
imports * as schema from './schema' and passes to drizzle()
exports const db = drizzle(pool, { schema })
Defines chats pgTable
Defines messages pgTable with FK reference to chats
chatId FK references chats.id with cascade delete
Defines WidgetSchema as discriminated union of all widget type schemas
Defines AIResponseSchema combining widget and text fields
GravityParamsSchema defined in types/widget.ts
KanbanParamsSchema defined in types/widget.ts
DashboardParamsSchema defined in types/widget.ts
HtmlCanvasParamsSchema defined in types/widget.ts
ChatMessage type defined inline in types/widget.ts
WidgetSchema union includes gravity variant using GravityParamsSchema
WidgetSchema union includes kanban variant
WidgetSchema union includes dashboard variant
WidgetSchema union includes html-canvas variant
AIResponseSchema.widget field is typed as WidgetSchema
docker-compose spins up the PostgreSQL instance that lib/db/index.ts connects to
Doc explicitly references lib/db/schema.ts and the two table definitions
Doc references docker-compose.yml as infrastructure for the DB layer
Doc explains the Drizzle ORM selection rationale over Prisma
Doc describes glassmorphism styling approach
Migration doc shows the exact lib/ai.ts reconfiguration for OpenAI-compatible Ollama provider
Phase 2 doc describes creation of Zod schemas in types/widget.ts
Phase 2 doc explains the generateObject approach
Phase 3 doc describes WidgetRenderer and registry pattern implementation
Phase 4 doc describes updating WidgetRenderer registry with real KanbanBoard component
Phase 4 doc notes KanbanParams are passed from AI generation to KanbanBoard component
Phase 6 doc describes the gravity payload structure from LLM
Phase 6 doc describes the N-body physics engine implementation
lib/skills.ts defines the Skill interface
lib/skills.ts exports BUILTIN_SKILLS array
The 'kanban' trigger skill maps to the kanban widget type defined by KanbanParamsSchema
The 'gravity' trigger skill maps to the gravity widget type defined by GravityParamsSchema
The 'dashboard' trigger skill maps to the dashboard widget type
The jsonb 'widget' column stores serialized Widget objects whose shape is defined by types/widget.ts
ChatMessage.widget is typed as Widget (inferred from WidgetSchema)
Color palette experiment informed the glassmorphism UI color scheme decisions

hyperedges.relation: Together they form the AI structured output pipeline: types/widget.ts defines Zod schemas, lib/ai.ts provides the model, and generateObject enforces schema compliance on AI responses.
Collectively implement the persistence layer: docker-compose runs PostgreSQL, lib/db/schema.ts defines tables, lib/db/index.ts creates the Drizzle ORM connection.
The widget rendering system: WidgetRenderer dispatches via WIDGET_REGISTRY to the correct component for each widget type defined by the Zod param schemas.
Experimental HTML canvas files exploring UI concepts (color palettes), cellular automata (Game of Life), and algorithm visualization (Bubble Sort) separate from the main app.
Sequential phase documentation recording the iterative development of IntelliRender from Zod schema design through widget renderer, Kanban, and 3D gravity visualizer.
NixOS/environment compatibility layer: dns-patch.mjs fixes Tailscale DNS, migration doc records provider switch history, and lib/ai.ts holds the current working provider config.
